features: High-quality natural fibre - The exfoliating gloves are made of viscose fibre, which is comfortable to the touch, safe for the skin and can effectively exfoliate. Deep exfoliating gloves are made with high-density stitching for greater durability. The exfoliating glove area is large enough for you to quickly clean your body.

Deep exfoliation - The double-sided exfoliating gloves feel comfortable and safe and thoroughly remove dirt, dead skin cells and impurities. The gloves are large enough to soften and regenerate the skin.

Easy to use - When using bath exfoliating gloves, immerse your body in warm water for a few minutes first, then soak the bath exfoliating gloves and add a reasonable amount of body wash to wipe your body.

MORE EFFECTIVE - Loofahs and chemical peels are not as good at removing dead skin as our exfoliating gloves. Our exfoliating gloves are rough enough to exfoliate deeply while soft enough to smooth and polish.

Wide use - Exfoliating gloves can deeply clean, remove skin dirt, promote skin metabolism and are very suitable for scrubbing in the shower. Body exfoliating gloves can be used for smoother skin on back, legs, arms and back.
